hero.title: FullStack Developer and Javascript enthusiast from France. Interested in React, Node & Typescript.
hero.subtitle: Hello, I'm Xavier Nouaille 👋
hero.paragraph:
Engineer and fullstack developer trained at Epitech Paris, offering my skills to design robust, high-performance, and high-quality web applications.
With over 5 years of experience in fullstack development, I've worked collaboratively with teams of 5 to 10 developers on significant projects.

about.paragraph0:
Engineer and fullstack developer trained at Epitech Paris, offering my skills to design robust, high-performance, and high-quality web applications.
With over 5 years of experience in fullstack development, I've worked collaboratively with teams of 5 to 10 developers on significant projects.

My journey began with personal projects, quickly evolving into professional collaborations. Among them, my contribution at Offeaze, a Saas platform, was significant. I worked on the frontend and backend development of the platform that facilitated the connection between coworking spaces and businesses/individuals.
Although the project came to an end, it strengthened my technical skills and understanding of user needs.
about.paragraph1:
Currently, I am part of the team at DialOnce, a SaaS software editor specialized in digitizing customer relations. My role is to orchestrate contact journeys in a dynamic environment focused on efficiency and innovation.

As a freelance developer, I offer my services for creating robust, resilient, and high-quality platforms. My expertise extends to building digital experiences.
about.modalText: As an experienced freelancer, I offer my services for the full design of your web platforms, whether on the frontend or backend, implementing robust solutions in TypeScript. I am open to any discussion to understand your specific needs and find the best approach for your project.

Frontend development with ReactJS & NextJS, backend with NodeJS, Koa. GraphQL & REST API. No-SQL MongoDB database
TypeScript overlay

Collaboration with a team of 5 to 10 developers.
